_meta.extractor: manual curation of imperative Test-Baseline* functions

skipped_functions.name: Test-BaselineDriftDetection
skipped_functions.reason: Meta/orchestration function. Detects presence of config-management agents (Intune, SCCM, DSC, Chef, Puppet, TeamLogicIT baseline files). Not a fixed atomic registry/secedit/auditpol check; the agent would need to enumerate services and file dirs and the portal would aggregate. Better modeled as separate 'service' or 'file_path' checks if needed; not emitted here per task instructions to skip pure meta.

custom_check_notes: Test-BaselinePowerShellHardening.PSv2RootFeatureDisabled uses Get-WindowsOptionalFeature (DISM). Modeled as 'custom' with notes on how the agent should fetch.
Test-BaselineWDACAppLocker.AppLockerPolicyExists / collections use Get-AppLockerPolicy cmdlet. Modeled as 'applocker' / 'custom'.

Test-BaselineM365UserPolicies and Test-BaselineUserPolicies enumerate per-user HKU hives. Each atomic check is emitted with hive=HKU and a path containing the literal string '{SID}' which the agent must replace by walking HKU profiles.

imperative_baseline_checks.label: Windows Ink Workspace allowed (not above lock)
XblGameSaveTask scheduled task disabled or absent
imperative_baseline_checks.notes: Agent should run Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName XblGameSaveTask. Pass if not found, or State=Disabled. Fail otherwise.

imperative_baseline_checks.label: Require AD backup of recovery key
Deny write to unprotected fixed drives
PowerShell ModuleLogging wildcard '*' present
imperative_baseline_checks.notes: Agent must enumerate values under HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ModuleLogging\ModuleNames and confirm at least one value equals '*'.

imperative_baseline_checks.label: MicrosoftWindowsPowerShellV2Root optional feature disabled
imperative_baseline_checks.notes: Agent should run Get-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName MicrosoftWindowsPowerShellV2Root and confirm State=Disabled.

imperative_baseline_checks.label: At least one DoH server address configured
imperative_baseline_checks.notes: Agent should run Get-DnsClientDohServerAddress and pass if count > 0.

imperative_baseline_checks.label: AppLocker effective policy has at least one rule collection
